meaning: n.[姓氏] 兰伯特 [物] 朗伯(亮度单位)
examples: He should consider offering up a prayer to St. Lambert.
"As we move further into recovery and businesses plan for growth, the demand for people with high-quality skills and qualifications will intensify," said Richard Lambert, Director General, CBI.
When spring came, a neighbor thought Lambert-Westcott's husband had a new woman in his life.
Lambert-Westcott got to know the owner of her gym and eventually bought the business from him.
